item.title: Abstract Security | Composable SIEM Platform
item.description: Break free from vendor lock-in with composable SIEM. Flexible data collection, AI-powered detection, and intelligent storage for modern SecOps teams.

item.title: Introducing Abstract LakeVilla: Pipeline-Powered, Analyst Ready, and Efficient Storage
item.description: Explore Abstract Security's blog covering security operations, SIEM, data pipelines, threat detection, and composable security architecture insights.

item.title: Platform | Abstract Security
item.description: Composable SIEM platform that fits your architecture. Centralize security data with AI-enabled SecOps, detection fabric, and flexible integrations.

item.title: Integrations | Abstract Security
item.description: Abstract supports hundreds of security integrations out of the box with all major cloud providers, SIEMs, threat intelligence feeds, XDRs, and data lakes.

item.title: Platform - Pipelines | Abstract Security
item.description: Control your security data fabric with Abstract's collection platform. Collect from any source, normalize at the fabric layer, and route to multiple systems.

item.title: Detections - Platform | Abstract Security
item.description: Modern detection models for security operations: in-stream, historical, and decoupled detection. Portable logic that scales independently from storage.

item.title: AI-Enabled Secops - Platform | Abstract Security
item.description: AI-driven security operations with intelligent detection, behavioral analytics, and automated response. Reduce alert noise and accelerate investigations.

item.title: Retention - Abstract Composable SIEM
item.description: Intelligent tiered retention strategies for security data. Right data, right tier, right cost—optimize storage for real-time detection and compliance.

item.title: Company | Abstract Security
item.description: Abstract is crafted by category creators and industry veterans known for redefining the cybersecurity landscape. Meet our team and learn our mission.

item.title: Get a Demo | Abstract Security
item.description: Request a demo of Abstract Security's AI-enabled SecOps platform. See how we help security teams collect, route, detect, and respond to threats.

item.title: Abstract Security Announces General Availability of its AI-Powered Data Streaming Platform for Security
item.description: Latest press releases, company updates, and news from Abstract Security. Stay informed about our AI-powered security platform innovations.

item.title: Contact Us | Abstract Security
item.description: Get in touch with Abstract Security. Contact our team for questions about our composable security operations platform and integrations.

item.title: Partners | Abstract Security
item.description: Join Abstract Security's partner program. Unlock revenue with competitive margins, collaborate with cutting-edge cybersecurity, and grow with exclusive tools.

item.title: Abstract Manifesto: Composable SIEM
item.description: Abstract's vision for composable SIEM architecture: modular, AI-enabled security operations with flexible data collection, detection, and retention.

item.title: RSA 2026 | Abstract Security
item.description: Meet Abstract Security at RSA 2026. Simplify your data operations. Join exclusive receptions like Night at the Mercantile and DETECTCON After Dark. Register or book a demo now!

item.title: Modern Day SIEM Migration Strategy | Abstract Security
item.description: Collaborative whitepaper by Abstract and Analytica42 on modern SIEM migration strategies. Make your SIEM part of the solution, not the challenge.

item.title: Security Data Pipeline Platforms Market Guide | Abstract Security
item.description: Download SACR Analyst's 2025 Security Data Pipeline Platforms Market Guide. Expert analysis on trends, vendors, and innovations in security data management.

item.title: Video Library | Abstract Security Platform Tutorials
item.description: Watch Abstract Security platform videos, tutorials, and industry insights. Learn about security data operations, SIEM migration, and integrations.

item.title: Events | Abstract Security
item.description: Join Abstract at our events! Discover upcoming security operations conferences, webinars, and industry gatherings. Connect with our team.

item.title: Abstract Intel Gallery
item.description: Operationalize threat intelligence with Abstract Intel Gallery. Enrich events with real-time IOCs, correlate adversary infrastructure, and enhance detection.
